title: Intensely Sweet Ethiopian Lentils Skewers
description: Tangy and bouncy, these Jain-friendly Ethiopian lentils skewers are meal-prep friendly and feature a caramelized sugar sauce, all robata-grilled to perfection.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Soak the red lentils in water for 30 minutes, then drain and set aside.
In a blender, combine the onion, ginger, garlic, cumin seeds, coriander seeds, and turmeric, and blend until well combined.
Add the blended mixture to the lentils and mix well.
Thread the lentil mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with lemon juice and season with salt.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are lightly charred.
Brush the caramelized sugar sauce onto the skewers during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional caramelized sugar sauce if desired.
